title: 强评测任务 vs 弱评测任务
title_en: Strong vs Weak Evaluation Tasks for Agent Tools

body.itemA: 强任务：反映真实场景，含模糊信息，可能需要多步工具调用。例：「帮我约 Jane 下周讨论 Acme 项目，附上上次会议记录，并预订会议室。」
body.itemB: 弱任务：过于简单或精确，Agent 只需机械执行。例：「用 jane@acme.corp 约一个下周的会议。」

dimensions.name: 复杂度
dimensions.a: 多步骤，可能需要十几次工具调用

dimensions.name: 信息完整性
dimensions.a: 含模糊/不完整信息，Agent 需自行判断
dimensions.b: 所有参数都已明确给出

dimensions.name: 测试价值
dimensions.a: 能发现工具设计的真实瓶颈
dimensions.b: 无法发现工具理解和组合问题

body_en.itemA: Strong tasks: reflect real use cases, contain ambiguity, may require many tool calls. Example: "Schedule a meeting with Jane next week about the Acme project, attach last meeting's notes, and book a room."
body_en.itemB: Weak tasks: too simple or too explicit — agent just executes mechanically. Example: "Schedule a meeting with jane@acme.corp next week."

dimensions.name: Complexity
dimensions.a: Multi-step, potentially dozens of tool calls

dimensions.name: Information completeness
dimensions.a: Ambiguous/incomplete — agent must reason and decide

dimensions.name: Diagnostic value
dimensions.a: Reveals real bottlenecks in tool design
dimensions.b: Cannot surface tool comprehension or chaining issues
